name: OpenAI Chat
description: Chat with an OpenAI-compatible LLM. Supports messages-based and prompt-based input. API key resolved from user's secret store (OPENAI_API_KEY by default). Compatible with OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, and other OpenAI-compatible endpoints — set the url parameter to use a different provider.

messages.description: Conversation messages array [{role, content}]. Used by the agent tool call loop.

systemPrompt.description: System prompt to set the AI's behaviour.

apiKey.description: API key (resolved from secret store by default).

url.description: Base URL. Defaults to OpenAI. Set to use other providers (e.g. https://api.deepseek.com/v1).

responseFormat.description: Response format: 'json', 'text', or {name, schema} for structured output.

toolCalls.description: Tool call requests from the LLM
